message: I absentmindedly looked out the window.
That's...
Someone was walking across the schoolyard.
Why's he out there?

name: Zakuro
message: "That's..."
Mamiya-kun.
He was carefully walking across the edge of the courtyard... where there was a shadow from the fence.
He looked like he was trying to step on his shadow.

name: Zakuro
message: "What is he doing?"
He walked to the left side of the schoolyard.

name: Zakuro
message: "Is he going behind the school?"
Actually, that's where the old pool is...
It looked like he was carrying a bunch of books.

name: Zakuro
message: "Where's he going? Doesn't he have class?"
I looked at the clock.
It had been ten minutes since class started.

name: Zakuro
message: "Maybe he's skipping class?"
Apparently, he skips classes a lot.
Though I'm in a different class, so I don't really know how often he skips.
'And my grades are terrible, and I skip class all the time...'
That's what he said.
He said it himself.
He said his grades were bad. I wonder how bad... Well, if he's skipping class all the time, they can't be all that great.
While I was thinking about that... he came back again.
I guess that took about ten minutes?
He appeared again from the same place he had gone off, walking quickly through the shadows.
He walked across the yard in less than two minutes and disappeared off in the other direction.
What's he doing?
I kept looking out the window.
The world on the other side of the glass looked very hot.
A few minutes later, he appeared again, carrying several books through the shadows.

name: Zakuro
message: "Why does he have to walk in the shadows?"
He would stand out if he walked across the middle of the schoolyard, but either way, it's not like people aren't going to see him.

name: Zakuro
message: "Why's he walking in the shadows?"
As I was thinking about that, he disappeared behind the school again.

name: Zakuro
message: "What was he going the other direction for?"
The front gate is on the opposite side of the school from the back courtyard.
So he's going back and forth between the main gate and the back courtyard?

name: Zakuro
message: "Now that I think of it..."
There's a bicycle rack outside the front gate.
The time between him disappearing and showing up again was too long for him to just be going to the front gate.
Which would make the bicycle rack his most likely destination.
Which means...

name: Zakuro
message: "Maybe he's carrying something from the bicycle rack?"
Maybe he brought some books from his house with his bicycle, and now he's carrying them somewhere?

name: Zakuro
message: "But where's he bringing them to?"

name: Zakuro
message: "I don't think there's any place to put books over in that direction..."
The old pool is still there, behind the school.
An indoor pool was installed this spring, so the old one will probably be demolished, but...
There's not much of anything else over there.

name: Zakuro
message: "I don't think there's a library or a warehouse or anything over there..."
What could he be doing?

name: Teacher
message: "Remember this part. It'll be on the test."

name: Male Student
message: "What, really?"

name: Teacher
message: "Yes, really... Make sure to go back over that part."

name: Female Student
message: "Stand!"
The class ended.
The classroom instantly got noisy.
And then I noticed class was over.
Oh no, that's bad.
I wasn't listening at all.
I accidentally scribbled all over my math notes.

name: Zakuro
message: "I just ended up drawing more boring pictures."
But while I was looking outside... I was drawing something.

name: Zakuro
message: "Hahahaha... That's why everyone says I'm creepy."
I never learn... do I.
I didn't see Mamiya-kun walking across the yard anymore after class ended.
This is the break period, even for him, I guess.
I pushed my math notes into my desk.

name: Zakuro
message: "I won't be able to use my notes to study with all these scribbles on them... I guess I'll have to throw this notebook away and get a new one."

name: Megu
message: "Takashima!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Eh? Ah, yes?"

name: Megu
message: "What are you spacing out for?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh, uh... Sorry."

name: Megu
message: "Hey Takashima, do you have one?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Eh? One what?"
Akasaka-san gently smiled at me.
But her smile was incredibly scary.
I tried my best to answer it with a smile of my own.

name: Megu
message: "Like I said, there's a concert in Raika. Do you have a ticket?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Raika? Oh, yeah. The concert at the CD store... I have one."

name: Megu
message: "Oh, I see. I couldn't get a ticket, since I didn't get to the CD store soon enough."

name: Zakuro
message: "Really?"

name: Megu
message: "Really. I went the day before yesterday, and there weren't any left."

name: Zakuro
message: "I-I think there were still tickets. I went there yesterday too."

name: Megu
message: "No way, there weren't any."

name: Megu
message: "You must have been mistaken. There weren't any when I went."

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh, yeah..."

name: Megu
message: "Jeez, even though you got one."

name: Zakuro
message: "Y-Yeah..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Akasaka-san. Do... Do you want my ticket?"

name: Megu
message: "Yeah, I do."

name: Zakuro
message: "Okay, then I'll give it to you... I'll bring it tomorrow."

name: Megu
message: "Really? That would be great."

name: Zakuro
message: "Yeah."

name: Megu
message: "Thanks. We're best friends, you know?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh, y-yeah..."
I hesitated before I responded... Her face looked really scary for a second.
But then she started smiling again.
I'm probably safe...

name: Megu
message: "Do you want to go to the bathroom?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh, sure..."
She invited me to the bathroom.
She's usually in a good mood when she does that.
She must be happy about the ticket.

name: Satoko
message: "Oh, Megu, you're going too?"

name: Satoko
message: "We'll go too. Tachibana, you too."

name: Kimika
message: "Hmm? Me?"

name: Kimika
message: "Ah, Zakuro... I'll come if Zakuro does."
Kimika came along too... Kimika always bullies me, but the truth is, she's really nice.
It seems like no one else knows, but Kimika is really kind... and she's the kind of strong person who would never let someone change her mind.
Though she is kind of distant...
But I don't really get along with Akasaka Megu or Kitami Satoko.
So I have to be really careful... I have to be super careful around them.

name: Megu
message: "So then the old guy suddenly started talking to me."

name: Megu
message: "He asked if 30,000 yen would be enough."

name: Megu
message: "Isn't that ridiculous?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Y-You mean... he asked you if you were a prostitute?"

name: Megu
message: "You know? It really ticked me off."
She ignored me and kept talking to Kitami-san instead.
Maybe she's annoyed because I said something so stupid.
Seems like I stepped on a landmine...

name: Satoko
message: "Why didn't you just take his money and beat him up?"

name: Megu
message: "No way. That's disgusting."

name: Zakuro
message: "...Yeah, disgusting."
I spoke in a quiet voice and agreed with her.
I couldn't even tell whether she heard me... and I was sweating.

name: Megu
message: "Disgusting. Just disgusting."
Akasaka-san looked at me.
I hurriedly agreed with her.

name: Megu
message: "It was scary having this old guy suddenly talking to me like that."

name: Satoko
message: "That's so scary. It's like he just goes after any girl he sees."

name: Megu
message: "Old guys like that are too desperate."

name: Zakuro
message: "Y-Yeah..."

name: Kimika
message: "You know... It seems like you're just agreeing with everything they say. Have you ever had an old guy talk to you like that, Zakuro?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Eh?"

name: Kimika
message: "What? Zakuro... You were just going along with whatever they said, weren't you?"

name: Megu
message: "No, I bet geezers like that can't resist girls like Takashima."

name: Satoko
message: "Geezers like that? lol."

name: Megu
message: "Takashima has to be popular with the geezers, right? I bet she would wear those weird outfits they sell in Donkey's. Maid outfits or bunnygirl outfits, stuff like that."

name: Satoko
message: "Oh, yeah, yeah. Cosplay, right? The one with all the cosplay stuff."

name: Megu
message: "What do you mean all the cosplay stuff? lol."

name: Satoko
message: "That's what they call it in Akiba, right Tachibana?"

name: Kimika
message: "Dunno... I'm not really sure. Have you heard of that, Zakuro?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh, y-yeah..."
I haven't really heard much about it.
Well, it's called cosplay...

name: Kimika
message: "Oh really...
So then, do you like to cosplay, Zakuro? Do you like to do it in public... or do you just do it at home?"

name: Megu
message: "At home? When no one else can see it? Isn't that kind of weird?"

name: Zakuro
message: "I-I don't really do anything like that."

name: Megu
message: "You don't? lol."

name: Satoko
message: "You would be perfect for it lol."

name: Zakuro
message: "Aha, ahahaha..."

name: Kimika
message: "Hehehe..."
This is the part where I'm supposed to laugh... I don't really understand, but I desperately tried to make a smile.
When she saw that, Kimika laughed at me.
Did I mess up again?
Here at school, anything I say can turn into a landmine... I'm always sweating in fear.
And of course, silence is just as bad. I stand out even more if I don't say anything.
I prayed for the bell to ring soon.

name: Satoko
message: "But she draws manga lol."

name: Kimika
message: "She draws during class too."

name: Zakuro
message: "No, that's..."

name: Megu
message: "What? Is there another event happening in Akiba this summer?"

name: Satoko
message: "What? Another Akiba event? Do you know about that, Tachibana?"

name: Kimika
message: "The famous one they do every year, right? There are tens of thousands of otakus that gather every year. It can get pretty crazy, I guess."

name: Megu
message: "Seriously?
There are really that many? lol. What they hell would they all do in one place? lol."

name: Satoko
message: "It must smell like shit there lololol. It would be like an entire city of nerds lol."

name: Megu
message: "Don't ask me lol, but yeah I bet it does lolol. Right, Takashima?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Eh? Oh, yeah..."
Well, there are a lot of smelly guys... and sometimes the women smell too.

name: Satoko
message: "Why would all those smelly people want to get together lol? What are they all going to do together?"

name: Megu
message: "I heard they sell anime porn lol. And they dress up as anime characters too lol."

name: Satoko
message: "What the hell lol?
Why would you draw porn like that, Takashima?"

name: Zakuro
message: "U-Um, for the record... I'm one of the producers, and that's kind of..."

name: Megu
message: "I bet she draws those manga where two guys fuck."

name: Satoko
message: "Two guys? Really?
What the hell is wrong with those people?"

name: Megu
message: "Oh, crap. That was the bell for the next class."

name: Satoko
message: "Isn't the next class English?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Y-Yeah, it is..."

name: Satoko
message: "No waaay."

name: Kimika
message: "What is it?"

name: Satoko
message: "He's definitely going to call on me today."

name: Megu
message: "Now that you mention it, the person in front of you went last yesterday. So you didn't do your homework today either?"

name: Kimika
message: "But isn't it Zakuro's turn today too?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Yeah, probably... I'm not sure, but it probably is."

name: Satoko
message: "Did you do it?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Yeah. I did it, but..."

name: Satoko
message: "Let me borrow your notebook."

name: Zakuro
message: "Eh? But..."

name: Satoko
message: "I'm trying to get a recommendation for the college here, so this is really important. My grades will fall."

name: Zakuro
message: "But if I give you my notebook..."

name: Satoko
message: "There's no time for me to copy it. Just let me borrow it."

name: Megu
message: "Can't you just skip class, Takashima? They'll let you go if you say you're not feeling well, won't they?"

name: Satoko
message: "It would help me out a lot if you could. I need your notebook."

name: Zakuro
message: "Sure..."

name: Megu
message: "Really?"

name: Zakuro
message: "All right... I'll let you borrow it."

name: Satoko
message: "Great!
We'll explain to the teacher."

name: Zakuro
message: "Sure..."

name: Satoko
message: "I guess this is what friends are for! Ahahaha."
I can't put them in a bad mood over something small like this.
I'll lose my award for three years of perfect attendance, but still, compared to what could happen, it's not a big deal.
So...
I guess I have no choice.

name: Kimika
message: "You're so kind, Zakuro... Hmm."

name: Zakuro
message: "Ow!"
After she said that, she pinched my arm for some reason.
She didn't seem all that happy about my decision.

name: Zakuro
message: "I'm skipping class..."
I stood alone in the hallway.
I had never skipped class before, so I didn't know what to do.
I have to go the school infirmary.
That's what I was told.
If you feel bad, go rest in the infirmary...
But maybe the nurse would see through me if I faked an illness.
Since I don't actually feel bad...

name: Zakuro
message: "What should I do..."
A quiet hallway... It's not really a question of what to do. There isn't anything I can do here.

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh... There are a lot of things I could do if I had a notebook and a pencil."
Jeez... If only I had something to do. I can't even go to the infirmary.
Though honestly, I didn't really want to go there in the first place.
Not only because the nurse would probably see through me, but also since there's no reason to go to the infirmary when I feel perfectly fine

name: Zakuro
message: "What should I do..."
I wandered through the hallway alone, lost in thought.
I hid in the bathroom when I saw someone coming.

name: Iida
message: "Seriously, there's no way."

name: Shiroyama
message: "No, really. It really was."

name: Iida
message: "No, seriously. Seriously now."

name: Shiroyama
message: "There you go again. I'm telling you, you should've seen it."
I leaned on the door.

name: Zakuro
message: "Those are lowlifes..."
They don't seem like good people. They almost always skip class.
Th-That's right... People like that are wandering around...
Does that mean I can't leave the bathroom?

name: Zakuro
message: "What should I do? Sitting in the bathroom alone for an hour is kind of..."
Or maybe... there might be some other place where they won't see me... some place the teachers won't find me either...
I guess the bathroom really is my only choice.

name: Zakuro
message: "Actually..."
Is Mamiya-kun skipping class right now?

name: Zakuro
message: "I wonder if Mamiya-kun knows a place where no one will bother him?"
He went off toward the old pool...

name: Zakuro
message: "Maybe I should go look..."
After all, I have nothing else to do for the next hour.

name: Zakuro
message: "No one's here..."
I thought Mamiya-kun came this way, but I guess he's not here.

name: Zakuro
message: "Or maybe he went to class?"
That might be it. There's no guarantee he skipped class again.

name: Zakuro
message: "Huh?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Is that... ash?"
There was a black spot next to the pool.
When I looked closer, I noticed that they were burnt cinders.

name: Zakuro
message: "This is..."
Manga?

name: Mamiya
message: "Wh-What are you doing?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Eh? Oh."
I suddenly heard someone behind me. When I turned around, Mamiya-kun was standing there.
He wasn't there a moment ago...

name: Zakuro
message: "Umm, something was burning, so..."

name: Mamiya
message: "N-Not really. It wasn't a very big fire."

name: Zakuro
message: "Th-That's not what I mean. Um, there was smoke in the air..."

name: Mamiya
message: "So what?"

name: Zakuro
message: "I-I'm sorry..."

name: Mamiya
message: "...Who are you?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Um, I'm Takashima Zakuro. I'm in the class next to yours."

name: Mamiya
message: "The next class?"

name: Mamiya
message: "What? Skipping class? Weren't you a good student?"

name: Zakuro
message: "I have certain circumstances..."

name: Mamiya
message: "Circumstances? What do you mean?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Wh-What about you?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Huh?"

name: Zakuro
message: "What were you doing?"

name: Mamiya
message: "N-Nothing, really..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Your books were burning, though... Did someone make you burn them?"

name: Mamiya
message: "No."

name: Mamiya
message: "It's just... it bugged me how the heroine in this manga wasn't a virgin, so I was gonna burn it and upload the video."

name: Zakuro
message: "Th-The heroine?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Y-Yeah... It's not like someone was bullying me. I just couldn't let it go, so I burnt it."

name: Zakuro
message: "I read that manga."

name: Mamiya
message: "Eh? You did?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Uh, yeah... I like manga."
It looked like he was going to smile for a moment, but then he gave a casual response.
Like he was trying to say, 'I don't care'...

name: Mamiya
message: "So you like manga... I see..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Yes... Mostly just shoujo manga, but I read shounen too."

name: Mamiya
message: "So you must be a fujoshi, right? The otakus must be all over you."

name: Zakuro
message: "N-No. I'm not a―"

name: Mamiya
message: "Well, who cares about something like that."
The atmosphere felt uneasy.
Did I step on another landmine?

name: Zakuro
message: "Do you like manga, Mamiya-kun?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Don't most nerds like manga?"

name: Zakuro
message: "So what about you?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Huh? Of course I do. I just said it!"

name: Zakuro
message: "I-I'm sorry..."

name: Mamiya
message: "Um, could you just go away?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Eh? Um..."

name: Mamiya
message: "If you stand around here... Yuuki will see us, and then I'll get beat up again."
Yuuki? Oh, he must be one of those thugs.

name: Mamiya
message: "You know, as long as you're here, I can't go back. You're bothering me."
Go back?
Why can't he go back because of me?

name: Mamiya
message: "Don't make me repeat myself."

name: Zakuro
message: "I-I'm sorry..."

name: Mamiya
message: "I don't need your apologies. Just disappear. Otherwise... Ah!"
His face twisted in fear.
He was looking at...

name: Zakuro
message: "The people from before."

name: Mamiya
message: "Tch."

name: Zakuro
message: "Eh?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Ah!"
Mamiya-kun grabbed my collar and pushed me down.

name: Shiroyama
message: "Did you just hear a girl's voice?"

name: Iida
message: "You're just imagining things 'cause you haven't gotten any action lately..."

name: Shiroyama
message: "No, really!"

name: Mamiya
message: "Jeez, why did it turn out like this? Damn it. What should I do... They're already so close."

name: Mamiya
message: "Um... Y-You can't tell anyone about what you're about to see!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Eh? What?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Just promise that you won't tell anyone about it."."

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh, sure..."

name: Shiroyama
message: "It came from over here. Someone's probably fucking."

name: Iida
message: "Hey, wait up."

name: Mamiya
message: "Come on..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Eh?"
He pulled on my hand hard.
Into the open manhole...

name: Mamiya
message: "What are you doing? Get in! Just go down the ladder."

name: Zakuro
message: "Ah, okay..."
After I went in, Mamiya-kun came down and immediately pulled the lid back over the manhole.
It was pitch black inside.

name: Zakuro
message: "U-Umm..."

name: Mamiya
message: "Be quiet... Also, this ladder is pretty high, so be careful."

name: Zakuro
message: "Ah, okay..."

name: Shiroyama
message: "Huhh?"

name: Iida
message: "Look, no one's here, just like I said."

name: Shiroyama
message: "That's weird... I'm sure I heard someone."

name: Iida
message: "But there's no one around here."

name: Shiroyama
message: "I definitely heard someone..."

name: Iida
message: "You got any smokes?"

name: Shiroyama
message: "Yeah, a few..."

name: Iida
message: "Sevens, huh..."

name: Shiroyama
message: "What's wrong with Sevens?"

name: Iida
message: "Sevens is the kind of crap old men smoke..."

name: Shiroyama
message: "Huh? Why don't you go smoke your mint crap then?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Th-Those bastards... They're smoking up there."

name: Zakuro
message: "Mamiya-kun..."

name: Mamiya
message: "Hmm?"

name: Zakuro
message: "U-Umm..."
My hands had gone numb.

name: Mamiya
message: "Tch... Go down the ladder, I guess."

name: Zakuro
message: "Down?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Yeah, I'll turn on the lights when we get to the bottom, so go down."

name: Zakuro
message: "S-Sure..."
'Either the well was very deep,'
'or she fell very slowly,'
'for she had plenty of time as she went down to look about her, and to wonder what was going to happen next.'

name: Zakuro
message: "It's like the rabbit hole Alice fell down..."

name: Mamiya
message: "There we go..."

name: Mamiya
message: "From here, you can get out through the irrigation canal, so just go that way."

name: Zakuro
message: "That way?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Look, over there, further in..."

name: Zakuro
message: "But my shoes will get dirty."

name: Mamiya
message: "Huh? Who cares about that?!"

name: Shiroyama
message: "I heard something! Seriously!"

name: Iida
message: "Again?"

name: Shiroyama
message: "No, really, I heard a guy and a girl!"

name: Mamiya
message: "Ah!"

name: Zakuro
message: "I-If we talk too loudly..."

name: Mamiya
message: "I-I know that."

name: Iida
message: "You're hearing things. You need to get laid, man."

name: Shiroyama
message: "That's not it."

name: Mamiya
message: "...Do you promise not to tell anyone?"

name: Zakuro
message: "About what?"

name: Mamiya
message: "I can't say what, which is why I'm asking!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Ah, okay..."

name: Mamiya
message: "Jeez... If I don't have any dirt on you, I really can't tell you, though..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Dirt?"

name: Mamiya
message: "N-Nothing! Who cares about that?!"

name: Zakuro
message: "S-Sorry."
Mamiya-kun is kind of mysterious...
Sometimes he seems frightened like this, other times he's relaxed, and sometimes he's really scary.

name: Mamiya
message: "Jeez... Of course you can't say something like that. That's too embarrassing."
I couldn't hear him well, but he was mumbling something to himself.
Mamiya-kun always seems to be talking to himself, just like this.
He's kind of strange.

name: Zakuro
message: "Ah."

name: Zakuro
message: "Whoa... This is..."

name: Mamiya
message: "D-Don't touch anything."

name: Zakuro
message: "Ah, okay..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Is this your hideout?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Hideout? The hell is that? Sounds stupid. Makes it seem like I'm a terrorist or something."

name: Zakuro
message: "I-I'm sorry..."
Oh, so hideouts aren't cool... I'm not sure, but I always thought hideouts were cool.

name: Mamiya
message: "Don't you think that word is nasty? That's the kind of word all the sheeple eat up."

name: Zakuro
message: "...Sheeple?"

name: Mamiya
message: "I hate the mass media... Anyone who watches TV or reads the newspaper is dumb as a rock."
Sheeple... Like sheep people? Is that a word?

name: Zakuro
message: "R-Really?"
I've heard the same thing about people who watch TV, but... don't smart people read the newspaper?

name: Mamiya
message: "That's right. The sheeple who watch that crap are stupid, vulgar peasants."

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh... Okay."
I heard the muffled sound of the bell.
It sounded like it was incredibly far away, since we were underground.

name: Mamiya
message: "Go on, get out... Class is over."
Mamiya-kun put his hand on the ladder in the back of the reservoir tank.

name: Mamiya
message: "The bell rang, so get out. And don't..."

name: Mamiya
message: "...Don't say anything about this place! Really, this isn't fair!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Eh? Um..."

name: Mamiya
message: "Why did I have to tell you my secret? This is so unfair..."

name: Zakuro
message: "U-Um... You mean, I should tell you a secret I've never told anyone else?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Eh? Eh? Wh-What do you mean?"

name: Zakuro
message: "U-Um... Well, you said it wasn't fair that I know your secret and you don't know any of mine..."

name: Mamiya
message: "Uh, w-well, I guess..."

name: Zakuro
message: "If you wait a little bit, I'll bring it here."

name: Mamiya
message: "Eh? Wh-What do you..."

name: Zakuro
message: "I'm not sure, but maybe it's as important to me as this place is to you."
I ran off.
Behind me, Mamiya-kun yelled...

name: Mamiya
message: "Wh-When you come down, make sure no one sees you!"

name: Satoko
message: "Oh, Takashima. Thanks for the notebook."

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh, sure..."
I took the notebook from Kitami-san and stuck it back in my desk.
Then I took out another notebook.

name: Zakuro
message: "This is really embarrassing..."
But it has to be, otherwise it's not a secret.
The pictures I drew while I was watching Mamiya-kun earlier...
It's not like I was drawing pictures of him, but still, it would be really embarrassing to show him this.
I wouldn't even want my parents to see this.
I'd like to take it to my grave, or maybe burn it... Either way, I wouldn't ever tell anyone about it.

name: Zakuro
message: "But that place is Mamiya-kun's secret, so..."
I stuck the notebook in my shirt and started running back.
That's right... It has to be something embarrassing like this.
It was this manhole, wasn't it?

name: Zakuro
message: "Hhm... H-Heavy..."
I couldn't lift it at all.

name: Zakuro
message: "Huh?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Wh-What are you doing? I thought it was someone else."

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh, I'm sorry..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Uh, um... earlier, you said..."

name: Mamiya
message: "Huh? What?"

name: Zakuro
message: "U-Um, you said you needed to know my secret."

name: Mamiya
message: "Eh? Y-You mean, like, your under..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Huh?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Oh, no. I-It's nothing... So, what is it?"

name: Zakuro
message: "No, like... my weak point."

name: Mamiya
message: "Your weak point?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Yeah. It's not fair that I know your secret, so..."

name: Mamiya
message: "U-Um, you mean..."

name: Mamiya
message: "E-Eh? Really?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Please take this!"

name: Mamiya
message: "What is this?"

name: Zakuro
message: "M-My notebook!"

name: Mamiya
message: "No, I can see that."

name: Zakuro
message: "Um, this is my weak point."

name: Mamiya
message: "Oh, okay."
He quizzically opened my notebook.
It really is embarrassing.

name: Mamiya
message: "Is it... a manga?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Y-Yes..."

name: Mamiya
message: "Well, it's pretty good."

name: Zakuro
message: "Eh?"

name: Mamiya
message: "What? Are you trying to go pro?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh, no... Not really."

name: Mamiya
message: "I see. Well, I guess it would be embarrassing to show someone something you drew, but is that really a secret?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Y-You don't think that counts?"

name: Mamiya
message: "I dunno... It's not like it matters to me."

name: Zakuro
message: "W-Well, then what would be better?"

name: Mamiya
message: "L-Like I said, I-I can't say something like that!"

name: Zakuro
message: "R-Really?"

name: Mamiya
message: "J-Just forget about it.
Jeez..."
Mamiya-kun crawled back into the manhole.

name: Mamiya
message: "Hey!
Why are you trying to come down?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh, uh..."

name: Mamiya
message: "Hmm... W-Well, I guess it doesn't matter now. I don't really mind."

name: Zakuro
message: "Do you stay down here a lot?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Here?
I'd get sick if I stayed here in the humidity... It's kind of nasty."

name: Zakuro
message: "Yeah..."
Even if it is underground, a sealed space like this really would get hot in the summer.

name: Zakuro
message: "It wouldn't be bad to stay here for a while, but I wouldn't want to stay for too long."

name: Mamiya
message: "It would be awful, wouldn't it? The temperature isn't really a problem, but the humidity is really bad."
I suppose so.
So it's not like he's always down here...
Maybe it's like an emergency shelter?

name: Mamiya
message: "What are you doing?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Eh?"

name: Mamiya
message: "I mean, I don't really care if you want to stay here, but..."
Mamiya-kun opened a hatch further in.

name: Zakuro
message: "Is that an exit?"
Mamiya-kun silently climbed the ladder.
Mamiya-kun disappeared.
Will he mind if I follow him?

name: Zakuro
message: "This is..."
It wasn't nearly as hot.
This place...
A huge space opened up before me.
Several concrete pillars stretched into the infinite void.

name: Zakuro
message: "We're not outside, are we? It's still just the afternoon..."
It wouldn't be dark at this time of day.
I never knew there was such a huge space here...

name: Mamiya
message: "This is the new school building's foundation. The new pool is right above us."

name: Mamiya
message: "It's usually pretty cool down here. When they turn on the air conditioning up above, it cools the air down here too."

name: Mamiya
message: "They put ventilation shafts down here so that the humidity wouldn't eat away at the foundation."

name: Zakuro
message: "It was built right over the old pool's drainage tank..."

name: Mamiya
message: "Well, maybe they were considering the possibility of using the old pool's drainage tank. Either way, it's really convenient for me."

name: Zakuro
message: "How did you find this place?"

name: Mamiya
message: "There are a few sets of stairs that lead down here, so I guess you can get in here from above, but all those doors are locked."

name: Mamiya
message: "As far as I know, they've never been unlocked. I doubt there's any way in here other than the route we just took."

name: Zakuro
message: "So no one comes down here..."

name: Mamiya
message: "There are drainage pipes over there, so maybe a maintenance worker would come down if there was a problem with the pool..."

name: Zakuro
message: "But bullies and teachers don't come down here?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Of course not."
Mamiya-kun walked further in.
I quickly followed him.
But still, the roof is really high.
It was built on a slope, so it makes sense, but still...

name: Zakuro
message: "Why's the roof so high?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Maybe they were going to build something down here? I guess they ran out of money halfway through."

name: Zakuro
message: "You think so?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Who knows... It looks like they could fit another whole floor down here, though I'm not really an expert."

name: Zakuro
message: "I see."

name: Mamiya
message: "Here it is."

name: Zakuro
message: "Here?"
Mamiya-kun suddenly pushed on the wall.
The wall gave in easily.

name: Zakuro
message: "Is this fabric?"

name: Mamiya
message: "I rubbed gravel into the fabric. It just looks like another part of the wall in the darkness."

name: Zakuro
message: "Wow... It's almost like a house. It's so bright."

name: Mamiya
message: "Yeah, that's why I have the generator. I can read or even play games in here."

name: Zakuro
message: "Can you use the Internet too?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Yeah, but it's super slow, since I have to use my phone to get a connection."

name: Zakuro
message: "But we're underground..."

name: Mamiya
message: "The building was probably designed so you could get a signal in here."

name: Mamiya
message: "Other than that... I guess I have these shelves for keeping food."

name: Zakuro
message: "Books..."
I've seen this bookshelf before. It's probably one of the school's...
But there are an awful lot of books.

name: Zakuro
message: "Are these your books?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Some of them are mine, but not all. I brought some books that my parents make me read."

name: Zakuro
message: "There are a lot of really difficult books here..."

name: Mamiya
message: "Those aren't mine. They're the ones my parents try to make me read... They're in the way, so I just keep them down here."

name: Zakuro
message: "There are a bunch of plays..."

name: Mamiya
message: "Those aren't mine either. They're from my house."

name: Zakuro
message: "From your house?"

name: Mamiya
message: "I don't really plan on reading them, but..."

name: Zakuro
message: "You don't read them, but you carried them here anyway..."

name: Mamiya
message: "I guess..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Philosophy books..."

name: Mamiya
message: "I don't read those."

name: Zakuro
message: "World literature..."

name: Mamiya
message: "Who cares about that?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Classic literature..."

name: Mamiya
message: "Who would read that crap?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Light novels..."

name: Mamiya
message: "A ton of them, right? They're all mine."

name: Zakuro
message: "So you like light novels, huh?"

name: Mamiya
message: "I don't think there's anything to learn from old books. Why do you need to read anything but light novels?"

name: Zakuro
message: "O-Oh, really..."

name: Mamiya
message: "Huh? Do you think there's something to learn from those old books? Only old geezers read them."

name: Zakuro
message: "Old geezers..."
I don't think that's right.
Well, that's not important.
But really... that's not right.
He's probably wrong about that.
I took a bottle off his food shelf.
A bottle of something...

name: Zakuro
message: "This isn't a bottle of marmalade, is it?"

name: Mamiya
message: "What?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Nothing..."
'First,'
'she tried to look down and make out what she was coming to,'
'but it was too dark to see anything:'
'then she looked at the sides of the well,'
'and noticed that they were filled with cupboards and book-shelves:'
'here and there she saw maps and pictures hung upon pegs.'
'She took down a jar from one of the shelves as she passed:'
'it was labelled "ORANGE MARMALADE," but to her great disappointment it was empty;'
'she did not like to drop the jar, for fear of killing somebody underneath,'
'so managed to put it into one of the cupboards as she fell past it.'
A passage from Alice in Wonderland, when she fell into the rabbit hole.
That's right...
This isn't the rabbit hole that leads to Wonderland.
But this was the first time Mamiya-kun seemed truly mysterious to me.
When I came here... I felt like there was something drawing me in.
Somewhere else...
Somewhere other than the place I am.
The world of mirrors... The world of mystery...
I know that nothing like that really exists, but for some reason I had gotten the feeling that there was something different about him.
Mamiya-kun seemed enigmatic at first, but...
But it was just an illusion.
This place lost its luster once I found that out.
It was just another dull place.

name: Mamiya
message: "Hmm? What's wrong?"

name: Zakuro
message: "I should be heading home."

name: Mamiya
message: "Eh? Already?"
I fled that place.
Behind me, Mamiya-kun yelled...

name: Mamiya
message: "Y-You can come back any time you want."

name: Mamiya
message: "U-Uh, Takashima-san!"
Before, he didn't want me to come here at all.
His voice suddenly sounded incredibly bothersome.
I hated the sound of his voice chasing after me.

name: Zakuro
message: "Ahh."
Nothing interesting ever happens.
Of course not.
If amazing things happened every day, we would get tired of them.
Life is just...
Mamiya-kun, huh?
Honestly, I was disappointed.

name: Zakuro
message: "Disappointed, huh?"
What was I expecting?
The sun began to set.
The color of the sky doesn't change with the day, but it does change with the hour.
It slowly changes to yellow... and then dyes all the buildings purple.
The sunset was depressing.
That was because I was already tired by the time I saw the scenery.
My body felt heavy. My heart felt heavy.
Even though nothing happened in the day. Even though it was all empty.
The only things that remained after such an empty day were the weight in my body and the weight in my heart.
And also... a strange frustration, almost like regret.
It seemed like regret, even though... I hadn't done anything wrong.
Of course.
No one could fault me for my choices today.
There was no point where my empty existence could have blossomed into a bouquet of flowers.
It's not like you can make life-changing choices every single day.
And even if there was a bouquet of flowers to fill the hole in my life... they would wilt in just a few days.
A flower without roots... withers and dies.
That's why I found the sunset incredibly depressing.
The scenery was too melancholy.
This melancholy scene was another...
It was the scenery of another conclusive ending.
This is how it ended, with a heavy body and a heavy heart.
It actually cheered me up a little to think that at least it was over.
The melancholy scenery outside passed from the right to the left, on and on.
Right to left, right to left, it flowed on.
As it flowed, the shade of purple on the buildings grew more apparent.

name: Zakuro
message: "Haa...
I ate dinner and then went to my room.
I idly surfed the Internet on my phone.
Though... it's not like that's any fun.
I had gotten a friend request from some man I didn't know...
He was a 30 year old businessman. His listed interests were the same as mine, and he said he had become one of my fans after reading my journal.
"You've got a good head on your shoulders for a girl of your age."
"It's nice to see that there are still some girls who think before they act."
That's what he said...
"You like Alice in Wonderland, huh? Have you seen Jan Svankmajer's version, Cheshire Cat?"
By the way, Cheshire Cat is my username.
"It's a very artistic film, but you're a smart, sensitive girl, so I thought you might like it."
Sadly enough, I'm neither smart nor sensitive.
"The Jabberwocky's Riddle community is having an offline meeting soon. Are you coming? If you are, I could bring the DVD for you."
Unfortunately, I'm not going (I've never even been to that site).
I wanted to send him a sarcastic reply like that, but... of course, I can't.
I wasn't feeling good, so I just let it go.
I aimlessly surfed the Internet.

name: Zakuro
message: "Now that I think about it, they're not gossiping about me anymore."
Kita High's message board, SAWAYAKA...
They call it the school's underground message board... Until about half a year ago, they said horrible things about me on here.

name: Zakuro
message: "Ugly..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Disgusting..."

name: Zakuro
message: "She must have gotten a boobjob..."
Well, sorry for that... I guess ugly girls shouldn't have big boobs.
Lately there hadn't been any new posts about me.
Since about the same time the bullying stopped.

name: Zakuro
message: "Bullying, huh..."
I checked on the anonymous bullying prevention forum that I had signed up for back then.
My thread was still there...
They told me to keep fighting. To never give up.
Telling me to never give up... Their advice only made it worse.
But there were also a lot of people who told me how to solve my problems.
They really helped me.
But one of them was a 28 year old man. I was scared of him, since he seemed more like a stalker than anything.

name: Zakuro
message: "I should've never given him my phone number..."
At first, I thought he was really nice, since he told me the phone number for a hotline for people who've been bullied...
After I gave him my phone number... he called almost every night...
He asked what I was doing.
He asked if I wanted to go somewhere to hang out.
It had nothing to do with bullying anymore... I got scared and changed my phone number.
But there were lots of good things, too.
The women in particular were always nice.
They were always kind... and I could relax, since I knew they didn't have any ulterior motives.
But one day, all the bullying suddenly stopped.
Because I was seriously injured.
It was painful, but now that I look back on it, it wasn't so bad. Now I don't need to come to this site anymore.
226: I Hate Bullies: 2012/01/15(W) 11:26:15 ID:KAERA
The new school semester started. Are you still doing all right, Cheshire Cat?
By the way, 'I Hate Bullies' is the 28 year old stalker.
You hate bullies, but you're just fine with stalkers, huh...
228: The March Hare: 2012/01/25(W) 11:30:20 ID:inkin
She hasn't posted anything new, so I guess she's fine.
229: The March Hare: 2012/05/09(Th) 11:35:40 ID:ADAMO
It's been a long time. I guess nothing new has happened.
I'm praying for you. I hope your life goes better from here on out.

name: Zakuro
message: "The March Hare..."
She was one of the kind women...
I wanted to tell her what happened after that...
But I wanted to avoid the stalker, so I didn't post on there anymore.
The bullying really had stopped.
The March Hare... She always talks about praying...
And she's always very polite and kind... She seems like a good person.
I really wish I could tell her what happened.
That the bullying stopped...
I wish I could at least tell her.

name: Zakuro
message: "Haa... I'm tired."
I looked at the clock.
It was already past midnight.

name: Zakuro
message: "Whoa... I need to get to sleep."
That night... I had a dream.
A dream I've never had before.
But one that seems so familiar.
Maybe... it was a dream from long ago.
The dream made me sad...
Then it disappeared.
